meaning: n.(<<圣经>>中指的耶路撒冷东垣下的)汲沦谷
examples: Asa cut down her image, crushed it, and burned it at the brook Kidron.
He even deposed his grandmother Maacah from her position as queen mother, because she had made a repulsive Asherah pole. Asa cut the pole down and burned it in the Kidron Valley.
Kidron sees Q1 device shipments dropping 18.8% sequentially from Q4, with smart phones dropping 30%.
Kidron lifted his FY 2012 profit forecast for the company based on higher expectations for sales of both iPads and iPhones.
Oppenheimer analyst Ittai Kidron echoed similar sentiments today.
